summary: Zyxel USG Firewall SNMP Metrics Monitoring Feature Testing Complete - All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully verified with all Zyxel firewall components working correctly.

minor.issue: Was not returning active_sessions and vpn_throughput fields - FIXED

backend_api_tests: POST /api/connector/device-report accepts Zyxel firewall data with device_class zyxel-usg
POST /api/connector/device-report requires API key (401 without key)
Firewall data (active_sessions, flash_usage, vpn_throughput, firmware, product_name, serial_number, cpu_detail) is stored in device_poll_status
Metrics history stores active_sessions and vpn_throughput for Zyxel devices
GET /api/connector/device-metrics/{device_ip} returns historical data including active_sessions and vpn_throughput
High sessions (>50k) data is accepted and stored
High flash usage (>90%) data is accepted and stored
Login with admin@86bit.it / admin123 works correctly
frontend_ui_tests: Connectors page loads with device list
Zyxel device (192.168.1.254) visible in device list
Zyxel USG Firewall badge displays in amber color when device_class is zyxel-usg
CPU gauge widget displays correctly for Zyxel device
RAM gauge widget displays correctly for Zyxel device
Firewall Status section displays with product name (USG FLEX 200)
Firewall Status section displays firmware version (5.37(ABUH.0))
Firewall Status section displays serial number (S/N: S212345678901)
Sessions widget displays active session count (20,000)
VPN IPSec widget displays throughput (100.0 Mbps)
Flash usage widget displays percentage with color coding (95% in red)
CPU Detail widget displays current, 5s, 1m, 5m averages
Metrics history trend chart (TREND ULTIME 24H) displays for Zyxel device
Device detail panel expands correctly when clicking on Zyxel device

updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (fixed device-metrics endpoint to return active_sessions and vpn_throughput)
/app/backend/tests/test_zyxel_firewall.py (new test file for Zyxel firewall feature)
seed_data_creation: Test Zyxel device created at IP 192.168.1.254 with full firewall data via device-report API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Zyxel USG Firewall feature fully verified. Backend: POST /api/connector/device-report accepts firewall object with active_sessions, flash_usage, vpn_throughput, firmware, product_name, serial_number, cpu_detail. Data stored in device_poll_status collection. Metrics history stores active_sessions and vpn_throughput. GET /api/connector/device-metrics/{device_ip} returns historical data including active_sessions and vpn_throughput (fixed in this iteration). Frontend: DeviceDetailPanel.js shows Zyxel USG Firewall badge (amber), CPU/RAM gauges, Firewall Status section with product name, firmware, serial, Sessions widget, VPN IPSec widget, Flash usage widget with color coding (red >90%), CPU Detail widget with current/5s/1m/5m averages. Test device at 192.168.1.254.
